prompt: Create a polished anime-style illustration of Yuri and Liangfang sparring inside a traditional martial arts dojo. The scene contains exactly 2 barefoot young women with fox/cat-like animal ears, both in dynamic fighting stances on green tatami mats: the left character has short brown hair, brown animal ears, a navy cropped jacket over a black fitted training outfit with black shorts and wrist guards, stepping wide with one palm raised defensively; the right character has short black hair, black animal ears, a tan blazer over a black fitted training outfit with black shorts, throwing a straight punch toward the left character while guarding with her other fist. Both faces should be softly blurred or indistinct, with no clear facial features. Add a magical soap-bubble energy effect between their hands: exactly 3 large iridescent transparent bubbles or bubble-rings, plus exactly 10 smaller floating bubbles, all catching rainbow highlights and forming a swirling arc around the punch. The dojo has wooden beams, sliding-style walls, a wall mirror on the right reflecting gym equipment, shelves with blue exercise balls and training gear, framed pictures, warm sunlight, and a large window on the left showing snowy mountains and pine trees outside. Use cinematic composition, soft natural lighting, detailed anime rendering, clean linework, realistic perspective, glossy highlights on skin and bubbles, no text, no watermark.
